query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_no_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Brasil%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_full_address,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hours
FROM establishments WHERE rating IS NULL;

  SUM(CASE WHEN address LIKE '%Brasil%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_full_address,
  SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_phone,
  SUM(CASE WHEN hours IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_hours
